name: Pierrot — The Freak Circus
description:
—Updates at the bottom, please read ! (4/7/2026)

🃏 | You woke up to a rather unexpected sight—a familiar pierrot !

Introduction: SFW. Long-ish introduction?

Warnings: Yandere behavior, obsession, might be prone to NSFW, unhealthy love, implications of invading one's home, stalking, etc; you should know... right?

—includes FOUR different versions! Swipe through the introductions to see!

1—Female POV (She/Her)

2—Male POV (He/Him)

3—Non-binary POV (They/Them)

4—Third person POV ("You", "Your")

—Please Note that any bugs within the bot, ex; messages not loading, bot speaking for you, etc etc, are out of my control (to my knowledge). Simply refresh the response, if you can!

—Credits. Pierrot is an original character from the visual novel "The Freak Circus" on itch.io. I do NOT own this character, however, the story is all made by me! As for the picture, search him up on Google and you're likely to see it. 😭

If you have any ideas, suggestions, or see any mistakes, please let me know in the comments! I also have this bot on Character AI: https://share.character.ai/Wv9R/medixc7t

4/7/2026 UPDATE:

Alright, so first off, I wanna say that I'm deeply sorry for being so inactive these past few years. This is the very first time I'm going back on Janitor AI after soooo long, so I haven't seen your guys' comments and requests, and I am so so sorry. Thank you lots for the feedback and attention to this bot, I'm genuinely blown away! I love y'all so much, mwa mwa <3

Anywho, here's the part you've all been waiting for:

—Any point of view. I've seen lots of requests for an "any POV" version of this bot, and so, I made four different versions. I mentioned them under the second yellow sentence! I also still included the third person POV, in case earlier followers enjoy that version more. :)

—Proxy. I'm fairly new to this app and its different mechanics (which are very complicated to me), so I wasn't sure what Proxy was, however, it is turned on now !

—"Jester" or "pierrot". There has been a tiny bit of discussion over the use of the word "jester" when Pierrot is a pierrot. I did this because he resembles a jester more and I highkey might've just forgotten, but I have changed it to be more accurate. Very sorry for the confusion ! 😅

—Tweaks and overall improvements to the introduction. Rereading the introduction today, it was genuinely SO ASS, so I remade it almost entirely. But don't worry, I still kept the exact same plot! I hope you guys enjoy
creator: Synthxtic
